allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/tasks -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"verify the stack"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/tasks -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"verify the stack"}')
Bash(bun -e 'const d=await Bun.stdin.json\(\); for\(const t of d.data.activeTargets\){console.log\(t.labels.job.padEnd\(16\), t.health, t.lastError||""\)}')
Bash(bun -e 'const h=await Bun.stdin.json\(\); console.log\("status:",h.Status\); for\(const l of h.Log.slice\(-2\)\) console.log\("exit",l.ExitCode, JSON.stringify\(l.Output\)\)')
Bash(bun -e 'const d=await Bun.stdin.json\(\); for\(const r of d.data.result\) console.log\(r.metric.name, r.value[1]\)')
